benefits.description: Lost almost 3 stone (42 lbs) since starting in July 2025, using slow titration protocol.

protocol_notes: Started at 0.5mg in July 2025, only recently increased to 1.75mg. Uses 'low and slow' titration approach to minimize organ stress (particularly gallbladder) and hormonal disruption. Achieves approximately 1 lb per week loss, which user notes results in ~3.5 stone annual loss without rapid tissue damage.
